context: Audit finding: P1-D1's context dropped the response body from ANVILML_DESIGN.md §13.4 (200 { status, version, uptime_s }), so health.rs returns bare StatusCode::OK with no body - a genuine spec/implementation mismatch, not deferred scope. Fix crates/anvilml-server/src/handlers/health.rs: add struct HealthResponse{status:String, version:String, uptime_s:u64} deriving Debug, Clone, Serialize. status always "ok". version = env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION"). uptime_s: capture a process-start Instant once at binary startup (backend/src/main.rs), pass into build_router() via axum::extract::State or a static OnceLock - real elapsed time, not hardcoded 0. Change handler to async fn health(...) -> Json<HealthResponse>. Add serde derive feature to anvilml-server/Cargo.toml if not already present transitively. Update health_tests.rs to assert the three JSON fields, not just status code. Acceptance: cargo test -p anvilml-server --test health_tests exits 0 with status/version/uptime_s assertions added.

description: anvilml-core: add missing ToSchema to Job/JobStatus/JobSettings
context: Audit finding: ANVILML_DESIGN.md §5.3 derives ToSchema on Job, JobStatus, and JobSettings, but P3-A1's context omitted it - job.rs has no utoipa import and no ToSchema on any of the three (P3-A3's ArtifactMeta, the very next task, correctly includes it, confirming this is an isolated omission). Fix: add `use utoipa::ToSchema;` to types/job.rs; append `, ToSchema` to the derive list on Job, JobStatus, JobSettings. Job/JobSettings keep current derives otherwise; JobStatus keeps Copy/PartialEq/Eq. No field, variant, or serde attribute changes - additive-derive-only. Debug+Clone are already present on all three, satisfying ToSchema's macro requirements. Acceptance: cargo test -p anvilml-core --test job_tests exits 0 (existing tests unaffected); cargo doc -p anvilml-core --no-deps exits 0 confirming the derive compiles.

Audit finding: ANVILML_DESIGN.md §5.4 derives ToSchema on ModelMeta, ModelKind, ModelDtype, ModelFormat, but P3-A2's context omitted it - model.rs has no utoipa import and no ToSchema on any of the four (same omission pattern as P900-A2's job.rs finding; isolated to model.rs and job.rs only - hardware.rs, worker.rs, node.rs, artifact.rs, events.rs all correctly include it). Fix: add `use utoipa::ToSchema;` to types/model.rs; append `, ToSchema` to the derive list on ModelMeta, ModelKind, ModelDtype, ModelFormat. No field, variant, or serde attribute changes (snake_case rename_all stays) - additive-derive-only. Acceptance: cargo test -p anvilml-core --test model_tests exits 0 (existing tests unaffected); cargo doc -p anvilml-core --no-deps exits 0; cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0 as the phase-closing regression check.
